notes:
Runs out of the box without any other Proton specific tweaks.

To make any controller work however, i had to go to the game properties and set 'Steam Input Per-Gate Setting' to 'Forced Off'. For the record, i used DS4 (Bluetooth & USB) & Xbone (USB) controllers to test. Without doing this, they are completely not detected.

This is not specific to Proton i believe but it has more to do with the earlier version of Unity which the game used clashing with Steam Input.

Game runs perfectly. 

It however, does not exit cleanly and the process needs to be killed manually via the terminal.
title: ICEY

notes: No issues in actual gameplay, but the game doesn't shut down properly and has to be killed manually.
title: ICEY
